OPENCTI_URL.description: The base URL of the OpenCTI instance.

OPENCTI_TOKEN.description: The API token to connect to OpenCTI.

CONNECTOR_SCOPE.description: The scope or type of data the connector is importing.

CONNECTOR_LOG_LEVEL.description: The minimum level of logs to display.

CONNECTOR_DURATION_PERIOD.description: The period of time to await between two runs of the connector.

CONNECTOR_RUN_AND_TERMINATE.description: Terminate the container after a successful execution.

COMLAUDE_USERNAME.description: Username for the account with API access in Comlaude.

COMLAUDE_PASSWORD.description: Password for the account with API access in Comlaude.

COMLAUDE_API_KEY.description: API Key for the account with API access in Comlaude.

COMLAUDE_GROUP_ID.description: Group ID for the Comlaude API domain search.

COMLAUDE_SCORE.description: Default score value to be assigned to domains (0 to 100).

COMLAUDE_LABELS.description: Comma-separated labels to apply to STIX Objects.
